System call definitions and interfaces for communication, BLE, event handling, profiling, and resource management.


## Files
- **[app_pp_syscalls.c](app_pp_syscalls.c.md)**: Defines syscalls for communication sessions, data transmission, capability checks, and analytics in the Pebble firmware.
- **[app_worker_syscalls.c](app_worker_syscalls.c.md)**: System calls for managing app workers, including checking status, launching, and killing workers.
- **[ble_syscalls.c](ble_syscalls.c.md)**: Defines system calls for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) operations, including scanning, connecting, and GATT client interactions.
- **[event_syscalls.c](event_syscalls.c.md)**: Defines syscalls for event handling and management in the Pebble firmware.
- **[profiler_syscalls.c](profiler_syscalls.c.md)**: System call implementations for initializing, starting, stopping, and managing profiler nodes.
- **[stack_free_syscall.c](stack_free_syscall.c.md)**: Defines a system call to return the number of free bytes in the stack.
- **[syscall.c](syscall.c.md)**: Defines system calls for time management, logging, and application control in the Pebble firmware.
- **[syscall.h](syscall.h.md)**: System call interface for Pebble firmware, including time management, event handling, BLE operations, resource management, and analytics.
- **[syscall_internal.c](syscall_internal.c.md)**: Implements internal syscall handling, privilege management, and thread local storage operations for Pebble firmware.
- **[syscall_internal.h](syscall_internal.h.md)**: Defines macros and functions for managing syscall privileges and checking memory access in Pebble firmware.
